claim: stationary-autonomous-winding spatial kinetic sculpture with a bold macro silhouette, watch-like fine-motion zone, and physically meaningful 3D drive path
non_claims: batteryless autonomous winding without an external low-voltage power source

value_brief.far_view: large visible winding drum and canted cage create immediate sculptural presence
value_brief.mid_view: the viewer can trace winding drum -> storage -> riser -> carrier -> escapement in one hero view
value_brief.near_view: fine fast-moving balance / pallet / escape details reward close inspection
avoid: large opaque carrier hiding the fine-motion zone
flat watch enlargement with no spatial transition
decorative autonomous-winding parts without force-path truth

autonomous_winding_architecture.storage: spring barrel or equivalent elastic energy store
autonomous_winding_architecture.output: regulated drive into the display train
autonomous_winding_architecture.claim_boundary: stationary autonomous winding architecture with external low-voltage power; real-world winding efficiency and endurance require later physical evidence

spatial_drive_transitions.name: horizontal_to_elevated_axis
spatial_drive_transitions.why_it_exists: moves force from the lower winding plane into the elevated canted display plane

spatial_drive_transitions.name: display_plane_to_canted_carrier
spatial_drive_transitions.why_it_exists: turns the tourbillon into a spatial focal object rather than a flat disk

preliminary_dimension_budget.fine_motion_zone_visibility: must remain open in hero view
